backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat application backend with global message board, user profile management, friend requests, and private message threads, protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the video call audio fix (attaching remote stream with audio to the remote element, ensuring getUserMedia requests audio) is implemented in VideoCallModal.tsx and useVideoCall.ts with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and other semantic color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Friends Chat app with meta tags for SEO, Open Graph, and Twitter Card social sharing, plus favicon and apple-touch-icon links pointing to the generated app icon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders the ChatView component as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat view component managing authentication state, profile loading, friend selection, video call lifecycle (including remoteAudioRef), and rendering the header, message feed, friends panel, private chat, and video call modal.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: Onboarding modal that prompts the user to enter a display name, auto-generates a username from it, and calls useCreateUserProfile to create their profile before invoking onComplete.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Friend list row component displaying avatar initials, online status indicator (based on isOnline flag or lastOnline within 5 minutes), display name, username, and an optional video call button that appears on hover.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Renders a single incoming friend request row with the requester's avatar and name, plus accept/decline buttons that trigger the respective mutations.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: Sidebar panel for searching users, sending friend requests, viewing pending incoming requests, and listing accepted friends with selection support.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of public chat messages with avatar initials, color-coded bubbles distinguishing own vs. others' messages, and auto-scroll to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Controlled input form for composing and submitting a public chat message, using the postMessage mutation and supporting Enter-to-send.
Full private chat view between the current user and a selected friend, handling thread creation, message display with auto-scroll, and a send form with an optional video call button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to new users for entering a display name and username, which calls the createUserProfile mutation and validates input before completing setup.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: A full-screen video call modal component that displays the remote friend's avatar, local video preview, and call controls (mute, camera toggle, end call), syncing local and remote media element refs with the useVideoCall hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, public messages, friend requests, user search, and direct messaging threads.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: A hook that manages a simulated video call lifecycle—requesting media, attaching local/remote streams, toggling mute/camera, and cleaning up tracks—with a 3-second timer to transition from 'calling' to 'connected' status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm coral/amber light theme, a dark theme, and video call-specific color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, font family, and accordion animations, plus typography and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, feature history, known issues (e.g., inaudible remote audio in video calls), and a summary of the chat app's existing and planned features.
